items.name_en: The highly anticipated Amazona 180 is finally here!
items.name_cn:
The highly anticipated Amazona 180 is finally here!
Featuring a mix of smooth nappa leather and patent calfskin with suede lining, the leather gets better with time!
Classic silhouette with the iconic Anagram embossing, full of retro and chic vibes!
Double zipper closure with ample capacity, suitable for commuting or dates.
Small size can be worn on the shoulder, carried by hand, or crossbody; three styles to switch between! The handbag style is professional for commuting, while the crossbody gives a casual, relaxed look. Very practical!
This Amazona 180 is definitely a treasure this year 💗
Small model number 89356 Dimensions 24✕18.5*10 (box and gift bag included)

items.name_en: The highly anticipated Amazona 180 is finally here!
items.name_cn:
The highly anticipated Amazona 180 is finally here!
Featuring a mix of patent calfskin and suede lining, the calfskin is soft, smooth, and premium. The leather develops a beautiful patina over time!
Classic silhouette, iconic Anagram embossing, and a perfect blend of vintage and modern vibes.
Double zipper closure with ample capacity, suitable for commuting or dates.
Small size can be worn crossbody, handheld, or shoulder; three ways to switch freely! The handheld look is professional for work, while crossbody gives a relaxed casual feel. Very practical!
This Amazona 180 is definitely a treasure this year 💗
Item No. 89352 Dimensions 24✕18.5*10 (box, gift bag)

items.name_en: 🔥 Large patent calfskin Panta Puzzle handbag 💥
items.name_cn:
🔥 Large patent calfskin Panta Puzzle handbag 💥
Puzzle features a unique geometric outline of a rectangular shape 🎁 This large version is made of patent calfskin with denim-style details. 💋
Geometric Bag 33CMPuzzle handbag, imported patent calfskin 🐮🐮 A bestseller from the Luo family 👜
The Puzzle handbag was Jonathan Anderson's first tote for L0⚡️EWE 😻 The rectangular shape and precise cutting technology create the Puzzle's unique geometric lines 👛
This large size is made of soft grained calfskin *The large Puzzle can hold a large wallet, all phone sizes, and sunglasses 🕶
Carried crossbody, shoulder, clutch, or with top handle *Removable 🎁
Dimensions: 33CM~21.5CM~14.5CM
Item No.: 9165
Color: Black

items.name_en: 🔥 Large Glossy Calfskin Panta Puzzle Handbag 💥 The Puzzle features a distinctive rectangular shape outlined by unique geometric lines.🎁 This large version is made of glossy calfskin, featuring denim-style details.💋 Geometric Bag 33CM Puzzle Handbag, original imported calfskin 🐮🐮 A bestseller from the Luo family 👜 The Puzzle handbag is the first tote bag launched by Creative Director Jonathan Anderson for LOEWE ⚡️ The rectangular shape and precise cutting technology create the Puzzle's unique geometric lines 👛 This large size version is made of soft grained calfskin *Large Puzzle can hold for example a large wallet, all sizes of phones and sunglasses 🕶 Can be carried crossbody, shoulder, handbag, or top handle *Removable 🎁

items.name_en: 🔥 New Version Geometric Bag Small Nappa Suede Featherlight Puzzle Handbag, Original Imported Nappa Calfskin 💥 Outlined by unique geometric lines, the rectangular shape. Soft and lightweight Nappa leather gives the handbag a casual and lazy style. *Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or carried by hand *Removable adjustable shoulder strap, featuring a rotating buckle *Zipper closure, articulated zipper puller *One external zippered back pocket, one internal slip pocket *Removable, featuring a hidden pocket and balloon dice *Rectangular metal studs 💡 This small size version is made of soft Nappa calfskin *Small Puzzle can hold for example a large wallet 👛 all sizes of phones 📱 and sunglasses 🕶 Can be carried crossbody, shoulder, handbag, or top handle *Removable 💙💚

items.name_en: 🔥 Mini soft grained calfskin Pebble Bucket Tote Pebble 👜 Merges pure minimalist lines with eye-catching design style 💄 Creating a unique and innovative handbag design. The iconic Anagram engraved hardware serves both decoration and practical functions, 👄 Adjustable shoulder strap length and suitable for multiple carrying ways, unique twisted structure complements subtle details. 👛 This mini version is made of soft grained calfskin. 😻 Can be carried crossbody, on the shoulder or handheld *Adjustable removable shoulder strap *Magnetic snap closure *Inner pocket *Synthetic leather lining * 🔥 Anagram engraved pebble 💥
